# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio permissive mtls.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: microservices-mtls-policy
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
  annotations:
    description: "Migration-phase mTLS policy - transition to STRICT once all services are mesh-enabled"
    migration-phase: "phase-1-permissive"
    target-mode: "STRICT"
    review-date: "2025-01-15"
spec:
  # PERMISSIVE mode allows both mTLS and plaintext during migration
  # This MUST be transitioned to STRICT after migration is complete
  mtls:
    mode: PERMISSIVE
  # Apply STRICT mTLS to services that have already been migrated
  # This limits the permissive exposure to only services still in transition
  portLevelMtls:
    # Services already onboarded to the mesh should enforce STRICT
    8443:
      mode: STRICT
    9443:
      mode: STRICT
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to restrict traffic even during PERMISSIVE mode
# This ensures that even plaintext traffic must come from known sources
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-authz-policy
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
  annotations:
    description: "Authorization policy to restrict access during PERMISSIVE mTLS migration"
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    # Allow traffic from within the microservices namespace
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - microservices
              - istio-system
    # Allow traffic from known service accounts during migration
    - from:
        - source:
            principals:
              - "cluster.local/ns/microservices/sa/*"
              - "cluster.local/ns/istio-system/sa/istio-ingressgateway-service-account"
---
# Deny-all policy as a safety net for unmatched traffic
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-deny-unknown
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
  annotations:
    description: "Deny traffic from unknown sources not covered by allow rules"
spec:
  action: DENY
  rules:
    # Deny traffic from namespaces outside the trusted set
    - from:
        - source:
            notNamespaces:
              - microservices
              - istio-system
              - kube-system
---
# Telemetry resource to monitor plaintext vs mTLS traffic during migration
apiVersion: telemetry.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: Telemetry
metadata:
  name: microservices-mtls-monitoring
  namespace: microservices
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
spec:
  metrics:
    - providers:
        - name: prometheus
      overrides:
        - match:
            metric: REQUEST_COUNT
            mode: CLIENT_AND_SERVER
          tagOverrides:
            connection_security_policy:
              operation: UPSERT
---
# Target STRICT policy to apply after migration is complete
# Kept here as reference - uncomment and apply when all services are mesh-enabled
# apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
# kind: PeerAuthentication
# metadata:
#   name: microservices-mtls-policy-strict
#   namespace: microservices
#   labels:
#     app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: istio
#     app.kubernetes.io/part-of: service-mesh-migration
#   annotations:
#     description: "Post-migration STRICT mTLS policy - enforces encrypted traffic only"
#     migration-phase: "phase-2-strict"
# spec:
#   mtls:
#     mode: STRICT
